parent_evidence.preservation_rule: The frozen 2/3 unseen result and exact failed measurements remain unchanged regardless of this exploratory correction outcome.

intervention.scope: Scale the neutral-to-lens text-state delta only over every decoder column in the failed occurrence's single-change target word. All other target words retain the frozen v8 strength of 1.0.
intervention.isolation_from_frozen_v8: The candidate is implemented in a new source module. Hash-frozen baseline v8 and controlled-v2 files are not edited.
intervention.baseline_equivalence_gate: The new implementation at strength 1.0 must reproduce frozen v8 neutral, identity, and full-lens PCM exactly before alternatives may be evaluated.
intervention.candidate_render_stopping_rule: Stop immediately at the first complete automatic pass; otherwise stop after all five strengths.
intervention.output_composition: Extract only the failed occurrence's frozen stress-plus-vowel measurement interval plus 25 ms context from the alternative full-lens decode and replace that same raw window in the frozen baseline full-lens PCM. Then apply unchanged output-domain-splice-v1 over the original complete window set.
intervention.window_independence_gate: Every occurrence window must be non-overlapping and must equal one original v8 splice window. If the failed occurrence was merged with another target window, stop without a candidate.
unchanged_controls: predicted durations, timing, F0, noise, and RNG seed
all nonfailed occurrence raw full-lens windows
three seeded natural source and target anchor pairs
all direction, movement, endpoint, target-gain, and identity-negative-control thresholds

outcomes.stopping_rule: This run ends after the first passing alternative or five failed alternatives. It cannot promote production or reinterpret the parent unseen failure.
outcomes.interpretation_limit: A pass shows that a deterministic occurrence-local strength correction can repair the exact known Heart target-gain miss while preserving the other four target windows and all unchanged gates. Because the strength is selected on the known failed fixture, it supports only a mechanism candidate and requires a new preregistered unseen confirmation. It does not establish broad text, voice, vowel, consonant, prosody, listener-profile, naturalness, or production validity.
